# fitlo (فیتلو)

> fitlo is a bilingual (Persian/English) web app for fitness coaches and their students.
> Coaches build a personal exercise library (GIFs, video links, notes), write day-by-day
> training programs with supersets/trisets, export clean RTL-aware PDFs, and get a public
> link-in-bio page that collects student intake requests. Students see their programs on
> their phone the moment they're published. Persian (RTL) is the default language.

fitlo is free for students. Coaches get a one-time 15-day free trial, then subscribe
(3, 6, or 12-month plans, paid in Iranian Toman via ZarinPal).

A defining feature: a coach can write a program against just a student's phone number —
before that student has an account. When the student later registers with the same number,
every program written for them links to their account automatically.

## Pages

- [Landing (fa)](/fa): product overview, how it works, pricing, FAQ
- [Landing (en)](/en): English version of the landing page
- [About](/fa/about): what fitlo is and the team's values
- [Blog](/fa/blog): practical guides on online coaching and program design
- [Coach public pages](/fa/c/): each coach has a shareable public page at /fa/c/<handle>
